events.change_summary: Intent check: fix --url stream by reading actual URL from webtorrent stdout

events.summary: Intent check pushed: fix --url by reading the real stream URL from webtorrent's stdout instead of polling a hardcoded path that no longer works. URL shortening is explicitly out of scope for now.

events.change_summary: Full scope: wire _find_stream_url into --url mode, remove HTTP polling loop, update tests S13–S19

events.rationale: Bug fix: restores broken --url behavior by wiring an existing function into the launch path. No UI changes (skip design). Well-contained to 2 files using an already-written helper (skip architecture).

events.decision: Use existing _find_stream_url function unchanged — wire it in, don't rewrite it
events.rationale: The function already implements the correct approach (daemon thread + queue + port-anchored regex) matching prior project decisions. The only gap is that it was never called in main(). Introducing new URL-scanning logic would duplicate code and risk diverging from the established pattern.

events.decision: Remove --quiet from the webtorrent command and pipe stdout
events.rationale: --quiet suppresses stdout entirely, which is why the existing _find_stream_url function never received the URL announcement. Piping stdout (stdout=subprocess.PIPE, text=True) makes the URL readable. The two changes are inseparable.

events.summary: Full scope (revision 2) pushed. Single phase: remove the 120-second urlopen polling loop, add stdout=PIPE + text=True to Popen, remove --quiet, call the already-written _find_stream_url to get the URL from webtorrent's stdout, substitute LAN IP for localhost. Tests S13–S19 rewritten to mock proc.stdout instead of urlopen; S13.test_url_flag_popen_not_piped replaced with a --quiet absence check; new test for timeout/empty-stdout path. Workflow: bug-fix, standard tier, scope → implementation → review → release.

events.rationale: Routine sync drift: HEAD fast-forwarded (stale HEAD is a strict ancestor of current) with a byte-identical dirty-status digest; swept forward automatically without waking an agent.

events.note: Beginning Phase 1: replace HTTP polling with stdout URL scanning in dhtplay and rewrite S13-S19 tests

events.description: Starting phase 1: Replace HTTP polling with stdout URL scanning
Implementing core changes: rewriting --url block and updating tests
